<div class="section-outer section-orange">
 <div class="section-header">
  <span class="section-header-text">In this section, we will discuss how to use, install, and author skills for agentic engineering.</span>
 </div>
 <div class="section-grid section-grid-3">
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="play"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Using Skills</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="download"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Installing Skills</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="pencil-ruler"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Authoring Skills</div>
  </div>
 </div>
</div>
